Operation 'remindSigners' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. While the summary is clear and actionable, the description lacks information about what the operation returns and important side effects (asynchronous delivery). Added details about return value and delivery behavior to improve AI agent understanding of operation effects.

data.current_description: Remind pending signers of a signature request.
data.description_suggestion: Send reminder notifications to pending signers for an envelope. This operation notifies all recipients who have not yet signed the document. Returns confirmation of reminder delivery. Note: Reminders are sent asynchronously and may take a few moments to reach recipients.
data.reasoning: While the summary is clear and actionable, the description lacks information about what the operation returns and important side effects (asynchronous delivery). Added details about return value and delivery behavior to improve AI agent understanding of operation effects.

message: Operation 'cancelEnvelope' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is clear but description is minimal. Added information about what happens when cancelled (workflow termination, recipient notification), return value, and important constraint about irreversibility to help AI agents understand the operation's consequences.

data.current_description: Cancel a signature request.
data.description_suggestion: Cancel an active signature request envelope, preventing further signing activity. This operation terminates the envelope workflow and notifies all recipients that the request has been cancelled. Returns the updated envelope with cancelled status. Note: Cancelled envelopes cannot be reactivated.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear but description is minimal. Added information about what happens when cancelled (workflow termination, recipient notification), return value, and important constraint about irreversibility to help AI agents understand the operation's consequences.

data.current_description: Fetch all signed envelopes.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve a paginated list of all completed and signed envelopes. Supports filtering and pagination through query parameters. Returns a list of signed envelope objects with completion details, signatures, and metadata. Use pagination parameters to control result set size and offset.
data.reasoning: Description is too minimal. Added information about pagination support, filtering capabilities, and what the response contains. This helps AI agents understand how to use the operation effectively and what to expect in the response.

message: Operation 'downloadCertificate' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_output_details. Summary is too generic and doesn't specify what type of certificate. Description lacks context about what the certificate contains and the output format. Improved summary to clarify it's a signing certificate, and enhanced description with details about certificate contents and format options for better AI agent understanding.

data.current_description: Download the certificate of a signed envelope.
data.description_suggestion: Download the digital certificate of authenticity for a signed envelope. The certificate provides proof of the signing event, including timestamp, signer information, and signature validation details. Returns the certificate as a downloadable file (typically in PDF or CER format).
data.reasoning: Summary is too generic and doesn't specify what type of certificate. Description lacks context about what the certificate contains and the output format. Improved summary to clarify it's a signing certificate, and enhanced description with details about certificate contents and format options for better AI agent understanding.

data.current_description: Fetch embedded sending URL for in-app document preparation.
data.summary_suggestion: Generate embedded URL for document preparation
data.description_suggestion: Generates an embedded sending URL that allows users to prepare and send documents for signature within your application. Accepts an EmbeddedUrlRequest containing envelope and configuration details. Returns an EmbeddedUrlResponse with the embedded URL. This URL enables in-app document preparation workflows without redirecting to SignEasy.
data.reasoning: Original summary uses generic 'Fetch' verb which is less action-oriented. Description lacks clarity about inputs (EmbeddedUrlRequest), outputs (EmbeddedUrlResponse), and the specific workflow benefit. data.current_description: Fetch embedded signing URL for recipient signature interface.
data.summary_suggestion: Generate embedded URL for recipient signing
data.description_suggestion: Generates an embedded signing URL that allows recipients to sign documents directly within your application. This enables seamless in-app signing experiences without external redirects.

data.current_description: Upload a template for reusable signature workflows.

data.current_description: Delete a template.
data.description_suggestion: Deletes a template by its unique identifier. Removes the template from the system permanently. Existing envelopes created from this template remain unaffected. Returns a success response. This operation cannot be undone.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description is minimal and lacks important side effect information. Added details about what happens to existing envelopes, return behavior, and the permanent nature of deletion to help AI agents understand the consequences of this operation.

data.current_description: Delete an original document.
data.description_suggestion: Delete an original document by ID. Removes the document from the platform permanently. The document will no longer be available for creating new envelopes, but existing envelopes that reference this document are not affected. Returns a success response on completion.

data.current_description: Create or send an envelope for signature collection.

data.current_description: Fetch embedded sending URL for in-app document preparation.
data.summary_suggestion: Generate embedded URL for document preparation
data.description_suggestion: Generates an embedded sending URL that allows users to prepare and send documents for signature within your application. Accepts an EmbeddedUrlRequest containing envelope and configuration details. Returns an EmbeddedUrlResponse with the embedded URL. This URL enables in-app document preparation workflows without redirecting to external pages.
data.reasoning: Original summary uses generic 'Fetch' verb which is less action-oriented. Description lacks clarity about inputs (EmbeddedUrlRequest), outputs (EmbeddedUrlResponse), and the specific workflow benefit. Added details about request/response schemas, use case context, and workflow benefits for better AI agent understanding.

data.current_description: Fetch embedded signing URL for recipient signature interface.
data.summary_suggestion: Generate embedded URL for recipient signing
data.description_suggestion: Generates an embedded signing URL that enables recipients to sign documents within your application interface. Accepts an EmbeddedSigningUrlRequest containing envelope, recipient, and configuration details. Returns an EmbeddedUrlResponse with the embedded signing URL. This URL provides an in-app signing experience without external redirects.
data.reasoning: Original summary uses generic 'Fetch' verb. Description lacks specificity about inputs (EmbeddedSigningUrlRequest), outputs (EmbeddedUrlResponse), and recipient context. Enhanced to clarify the request schema, response format, and the embedded signing workflow benefit for AI agents.

data.current_description: Upload a template for reusable signature workflows.
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new reusable template for signature workflows. Accepts template configuration including document content, recipient fields, and workflow settings. Returns a Template object with the assigned template ID and metadata. The uploaded template can be used to create multiple envelopes with consistent configurations.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description needs enhancement to specify inputs (template configuration details), outputs (Template object with ID), and side effects (template becomes available for reuse). This helps AI agents understand what data to provide and what to expect in return.

data.current_description: Fetch a template by identifier.

data.current_description: Delete a template.
data.description_suggestion: Deletes a template by its unique identifier. Requires the template ID as a path parameter. Returns a success confirmation. Deleted templates cannot be used to create new envelopes, but existing envelopes created from the template remain unaffected. This action is permanent.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear but description is extremely minimal. data.current_description: Create or send an envelope for signature collection.

Returns an Envelope object with a unique ID and current status. Recipients will receive notifications based on the envelope configuration.

data.current_description: Cancel a signature request.
data.description_suggestion: Cancel an active signature request envelope, preventing further signing activity. This operation terminates the envelope workflow and notifies all recipients that the request has been cancelled. Returns the updated envelope with cancelled status. Note: Cancelled envelopes cannot be reactivated.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear but description is minimal. Added information about what happens when cancelled (workflow termination, recipient notification), return value, and important constraint about irreversibility to help AI agents understand the operation's consequences.
